description: ThousandEyes capabilities for manufacturing companies including discrete manufacturing, process manufacturing, and industrial IoT

common_requirements.answer: Yes. ThousandEyes monitors MES applications for availability, performance, and network connectivity across manufacturing facilities.
Partial. ThousandEyes monitors network connectivity to SCADA systems and application availability but does not monitor SCADA control logic.
Partial. ThousandEyes monitors network paths to IoT devices and endpoints but does not monitor the IoT devices themselves.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides real-time monitoring of network-dependent production systems with immediate alerting on connectivity issues.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors EDI endpoints and B2B integrations through HTTP/API testing for availability and performance.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors SAP, Oracle, and other ERP systems through HTTP/API testing and web transaction monitoring.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors WMS applications for availability, response time, and transaction completion across warehouse locations.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides end-to-end network visibility across multiple manufacturing plants with path visualization and performance metrics.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides SD-WAN monitoring with path selection visibility, performance metrics, and optimization recommendations.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors network paths across OT/IT segments to ensure proper isolation while validating required connectivity.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors cloud-based ERP systems including SAP S/4HANA Cloud for availability and performance from global locations.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors PLM and CAD applications including Autodesk Fusion and PTC Windchill through synthetic testing.
Yes. ThousandEyes monitors Microsoft 365 services including Teams, SharePoint, and Outlook for manufacturing user experience.
Partial. ThousandEyes monitors network anomalies and path changes but does not provide OT-specific security analysis; integrates with OT security tools.
Yes. ThousandEyes maintains SOC 2 Type II certification for security controls and practices.
Yes. ThousandEyes integrates natively with ServiceNow for automated incident creation and CMDB correlation.
Yes. ThousandEyes provides native Splunk integration for security monitoring and log correlation.
Yes. ThousandEyes supports hybrid deployment with cloud platform and on-premise Enterprise Agents in manufacturing facilities.
Partial. Enterprise Agents can monitor within air-gapped environments but require internet connectivity for reporting to ThousandEyes cloud platform.
Yes. ThousandEyes Endpoint Agents monitor remote worker connectivity including VPN, WiFi, and application performance for factory personnel.
